action.reasoning: Observation: Adding mutation one-hot features hurt test Spearman (0.7338 vs 0.7453). Analysis: One-hot features overfit to ≤2 mutation training distribution. Need better extrapolation. Decision: Try ridge regression (often better for extrapolation), lighter NN with stronger regularization, and ensemble. Also try using only mutation region embeddings.
